mapper.sql: select participant_id, activity_id, user_id, user_name, join_time, status, proof_image_url, proof_status, proof_submit_time, proof_audit_by, proof_audit_time, proof_audit_remark, reward_granted, reward_time, reward_points, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from hx_activity_participant
mapper.select: where activity_id = #{activityId} order by join_time desc

select a.activity_id as activityId, a.title as title, a.summary as summary, a.cover_url as coverUrl, a.start_time as startTime, a.end_time as endTime, a.location as location, a.max_participants as maxParticipants, a.participant_count as participantCount, a.status as activityStatus, p.participant_id as participantId, p.status as joinStatus, p.join_time as joinTime, p.proof_status as proofStatus, p.proof_image_url as proofImageUrl, p.proof_audit_remark as proofAuditRemark, p.reward_granted as rewardGranted, p.reward_points as rewardPoints, p.reward_time as rewardTime from hx_activity_participant p inner join hx_activity a on p.activity_id = a.activity_id where p.user_id = #{userId} and p.status = '1' and (a.del_flag is null or a.del_flag <> '2') order by p.join_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hx_activity_participant( activity_id, user_id, user_name, join_time, status, proof_image_url, proof_status, proof_submit_time, proof_audit_by, proof_audit_time, proof_audit_remark, reward_granted, reward_time, reward_points, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{activityId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{joinTime}, #{status}, #{proofImageUrl}, #{proofStatus}, #{proofSubmitTime}, #{proofAuditBy}, #{proofAuditTime}, #{proofAuditRemark}, #{rewardGranted}, #{rewardTime}, #{rewardPoints}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
delete from hx_activity_participant where participant_id in
#{participantId}
mapper.select: select a.activity_id as activityId, a.title as title, a.status as activityStatus, a.start_time as startTime, a.end_time as endTime, p.participant_id as participantId, p.join_time as joinTime, p.status as joinStatus, p.proof_status as proofStatus, p.proof_submit_time as proofSubmitTime, p.proof_audit_by as proofAuditBy, p.proof_audit_time as proofAuditTime, p.proof_audit_remark as proofAuditRemark, p.reward_granted as rewardGranted, p.reward_points as rewardPoints, p.reward_time as rewardTime, case when NOW() > a.end_time then '已结束' when NOW() < a.start_time then '未开始' else '进行中' end as status, case when NOW() > a.end_time then 'default' when NOW() < a.start_time then 'info' else 'success' end as statusType from hx_activity_participant p inner join hx_activity a on p.activity_id = a.activity_id where p.user_id = #{userId} and (p.status = '1' or p.status = '0' or p.status = '2') and (a.del_flag is null or a.del_flag <> '2') order by p.join_time desc
